How It Works

Three steps. Two seconds. Zero guesswork.

Step 1
📸

Snap a Photo

Take a quick photo of your meal — any food, any plate, anywhere.

Step 2
🤖

AI Does the Work

Our AI instantly identifies every item and calculates calories, protein, carbs, and fats.

Step 3
🎯

Hit Your Goals

Track your daily progress with beautiful charts and auto-generated nutrition goals.

Built for Gym Members

Everything you need to fuel your training.

🔥

Smart Calorie Goals

Auto-generated targets based on your body, goals, and activity level.

💪

Macro Tracking

Protein, carbs, fats — all tracked automatically from a single photo.

📊

Progress Dashboard

Streaks, weight trends, BMI, and goal journey — all in one view.

⚡

Exercise Logging

Log your workouts and see how burned calories adjust your daily budget.

💧

Water Reminders

Stay hydrated with smart water intake reminders throughout the day.

🏆

Challenges & Streaks

Keep motivated with daily streaks, achievements, and social challenges.

Your gym handles the workouts. CalTrek handles the nutrition.
